name_en: Original Batch 【Model: 6151】❤️A selection of soft and durable full-grain leather totes. Features British House tartan fabric pieces, crafted by an Italian workshop. Clean and refined dimensions with multiple slip pockets and zip pockets. Gold metal base for protection. Includes adjustable top handle or detachable narrow shoulder strap; suitable for hand or crossbody. 26 x 12 x 21cm
